sources.name: Basel Committee standards and guidance
sources.completeness_note: Ingested from BIS APIs — covers published standards and guidance documents. Individual paragraph-level granularity varies by document.

sources.name: FATF Recommendations and Methodology
sources.completeness_note: Full FATF publications corpus ingested from faceted export dump.

sources.name: FATF high-risk and monitored jurisdictions
sources.completeness_note: Point-in-time snapshot of grey/black list status. Updated when FATF publishes new list.

sources.name: IOSCO principles and publications
sources.completeness_note: Ingested from v2 crawl dump with direct crawl and RSS fallback. Data is stale — last refresh May 2023.

sources.name: IAIS insurance core principles and publications
sources.completeness_note: Ingested from IAIS sitemap. Covers published standards and guidance.

sources.name: FSB policy and publications
sources.completeness_note: Ingested from FSB sitemap and RSS feeds. Covers key attributes and peer reviews.

sources.name: CPMI-IOSCO standards and PFMI implementation
sources.completeness_note: Ingested from BIS APIs. Includes PFMI principles and implementation monitoring records.

gaps.description: IOSCO data is stale (last refresh May 2023)
gaps.reason: IOSCO website structure changed; v2 crawl dump has not been refreshed

gaps.description: National mappings are seed data only (5 sample records)
gaps.reason: Comprehensive country-level mapping requires manual legal research

gaps.description: Mutual evaluations are seed data only (3 sample records)
gaps.reason: Full FATF mutual evaluation corpus requires structured extraction from PDF reports

gaps.description: CPMI-IOSCO PFMI individual jurisdiction assessment results not included
gaps.reason: Assessment data available in PDFs only, not machine-readable

gaps.description: FATF grey/black lists are point-in-time snapshots, not real-time
gaps.reason: No FATF API for real-time list status; updated manually from FATF publications
Definition extraction from regulatory text is partial

tools.name: search_financial_regulation
tools.description: FTS5 search across all regulatory provisions

tools.name: get_provision
tools.description: Retrieve a single provision by source and item ID

tools.name: get_basel_standard
tools.description: List Basel standards or retrieve provisions by standard ID

tools.name: get_fatf_recommendation
tools.description: Retrieve a FATF recommendation by code or number

tools.name: check_fatf_status
tools.description: Check FATF high-risk/monitoring list status for a country

tools.name: get_mutual_evaluation_summary
tools.description: Get mutual evaluation summaries by jurisdiction

tools.name: map_to_national_requirements
tools.description: Map international provisions to country-level requirements

tools.name: compare_requirements
tools.description: Compare requirements on a topic across regulatory sources

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List all sources with coverage and freshness metadata

tools.name: about
tools.description: Return server identity, scope, and capability summary

tools.name: check_data_freshness
tools.description: Evaluate source freshness based on timestamps and windows
